ColorBlindTest.description: Represents a color blindness test consisting of a title and a collection of test plates.

Plates.description: all plates in the test. The order of plates is important, as it will be used to determine the sequence of presentation to the user.

Plate.description: Describe how to present a plate to the user, and how the user can answer. The answer can be through clicking buttons, or key-in answer through virtual keyboard, or voice input, or drawing on the screen.

PlatePath.description: Relative file path to the plate. e.g. Letter_Single/ishihara_A.svg

Answer.description:
User input answer through selecting a button on the screen, or key-in the answer through a virtual keyboard. e.g. A, LTE
If InputMethod is ImageButtons, the answer could be General1/Letters/A.svg

ButtonTexts.description: If InputMethod is ImageButtons, each button text is a (relative) file path to the source image.

Order.description: Optional. The the app may randomize the order of plates.

PlateNature.description: This will determine how the UI present the way of answering
